title: Sage Green 5 Inch Latex Balloons, Pack of 50 Retro Avocado Green for Garland, Wedding, Baby Shower, Christmas, Jungle Theme Party Decor
features: 🎈【Package Includes】You'll get 50 pieces 5 inch Retro Sage Green balloons, which are enough to decorate your party to keep it interesting, the 5-inch size and dazzling Sage Green color will make your party very attractive, a great way to decorate a birthday or other party.

🎈【High Quality Latex】All materials of balloons are of high quality and good safety, which is non-toxic, odorless and harmlessness for decorate at your party. These are thicker than others, not easy to break, very durable and reusable. Balloons can last a long time, and you can continue to use it next time.

🎈【Perfect Party Decorations】5 Inches balloons are very popular in party decorations. You can use these 50 balloons to make a plain theme balloon garland, or you can make a special balloon garland with other balloons of different sizes or colors. 5 Inches balloons are nice favors for birthday party, baby shower party, wedding party, anniversary party, New Year party, Valentines, Christmas, outdoor or indoor holiday celebration events. You will make a most memorable party.

🎈【How to Inflate Balloons】It is recommended to inflate the balloons with a pump to avoid water vapor on the inner wall of the balloon and affect the appearance, the filler can be water, air, helium or oxygen, etc. You can store it in the drawer when you don’t use it, and continue to use it next time.

🎈【Attention】We suggest to be slow when inflating the balloons. You can use a pump to inflate to 90%, and then blow with a straw to control the air volume so as not to break. Avoid the balloon contact with high temperature, avoid using pointed objects to stab the balloon.
description: Product Description Assorted color and sizes balloons can be used to decorate birthday parties, rainbow birthday parties, baby showers, bridal showers, wedding, christmas, new year party, anniversary, gender reveal etc. It will make your party full of balloons and the most exciting party accessories! We have a wide range of 36inch, 18inch, 12inch, 10inch, 5inch balloons. You can choose the size you need to match and these balloons will make a great addition to your party! Use high-end balloons for decorating your party. You can match with other colorful balloons, such as sage green balloons, nude balloons, cream balloons, brown balloons, red balloons, pink balloons and so on. Our balloons made of high-quality latex, very easy to inflate, not easy to burst. Durable and reusable. Balloons can last a long time, and you can continue to use it next time. Inflate the balloon appropriately according to the picture, Stop inflate the balloon when it like a ‘pear’ to prevent the balloon from popping.
